description: CompositionPurple slacks made of a polyester-lycra blend, has an elasticated waist and reinforced stitching along the crotch areaFittingSlimWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentDo not wring or bleachFlat dry in shadeReturn to holistic living in style with these slacks from scullers. Designed for comfort with sweat-absorbent fabric, these slacks allow you to concentrate on the task at hand with much ease. The fabric allows you to stretch with ease, while the reinforced tear points ensure that your slacks last longer, and the flat seams around the waist and sides prevent irritation. Pair this with an ethnic kurti and comfortable flip flops for absolute comfort.Model statisticsThe model wears slacks of length 39"Height: 5'7”; Waist: 25”; Hips: 35”
